board_identity.description: Connector, adapter, breakout, or IO interface board

alternatives.description: Power conversion, protection, or distribution board
Controller, development, or embedded compute board
Motor, relay, solenoid, or high-current actuator driver board

functional_blocks.label: Input power/protection
functional_blocks.function: Accepts incoming power and protects downstream circuitry

functional_blocks.label: External IO/connectors
functional_blocks.function: Provides external electrical connections to a machine or host

required_measurements: unpowered resistance between power and ground

limitations: pin assignments are inferred from labels and known pinouts; verify with continuity and voltage measurements
image-only connector geometry cannot determine exact pin order without calibration or close-up photos
do not power harvested modules until polarity, rails, and isolation are confirmed

strategy.reason: Top opportunity is Bench Power Supply Module with score 0.53.

limitations: value estimates are planning estimates until parts are tested and market prices are verified
salvaged modules need electrical validation before resale or reuse
e-commerce arbitrage requires listing price, shipping, failure rate, labor, and demand checks

steps: run electrical validation on every reused module
estimate enclosure, labor, and resale price
validation_gates: all reused modules pass basic continuity

steps: run electrical validation on every reused module
estimate enclosure, labor, and resale price
validation_gates: all reused modules pass basic continuity
operator_notes: treat salvaged parts as untrusted until tested
record test results back into inventory after each gate
separate resale-grade parts from build-only parts

gates: all reused modules pass basic continuity
pass_criteria: thermal behavior stable for first 5 minutes
all external pins labeled before integration

notes: use workflow machine_connection_map when available for harvested modules
map every salvaged connector with continuity before connecting recipe wiring

starter_tasks: read each attached sensor or toggle each output individually
add fault timeout before unattended use

listing_checklist: include safety disclaimers for high-voltage or load-switching products
